items.title: Apex Genie
items.description: Offline-first extension for converting JSON into typed Apex classes, generating test classes, and packaging outputs directly in the browser.
items.problemSolved: Reduces the manual effort of converting JSON payloads into usable Apex models and test scaffolding.
items.impact: Speeds up Salesforce API and integration work by turning raw payloads into ready-to-use code in seconds.

items.title: SLDS Icons Kit
items.description: Full-tab extension for browsing the SLDS icon library, previewing styles live, and copying LWC, Aura, and SLDS snippets instantly.
items.problemSolved: Makes SLDS icon discovery and code snippet lookup faster than switching between docs, builders, and editor tabs.
items.impact: Improves Salesforce UI development speed for teams working across LWC, Aura, and SLDS-based interfaces.

items.title: Base64 Buddy
items.description: Lightweight extension for encoding and decoding files in Base64 with previews, copy helpers, and privacy-first local processing.
items.problemSolved: Eliminates the need for ad hoc online encoders when working with files, data URIs, and debugging payloads.
items.impact: Enables privacy-safe local encoding and decoding workflows for developers and support operations.

items.title: DiffBoard
items.description: Developer-focused extension for side-by-side code, text, and JSON comparison with clear diff highlighting and one-click copy utilities.
items.problemSolved: Provides a fast in-browser way to compare code, config, and JSON without jumping into heavier desktop tooling.
items.impact: Supports debugging and review workflows with quicker change inspection and cleaner diff output.

items.title: Salesforce Package XML Generator
items.description: Extension for exploring live org metadata and generating accurate package.xml files visually for deployments and release workflows.
items.problemSolved: Removes the friction of manually authoring package.xml files across complex Salesforce metadata selections.
items.impact: Helps release workflows move faster with fewer deployment packaging errors.

items.title: Salesforce Metadata Exporter
items.description: Lightweight extension for exporting Salesforce metadata from a logged-in org into a downloadable ZIP with quick presets and generated package.xml.
items.problemSolved: Gives developers a simpler path to export metadata without relying on full CLI setup during quick audits and troubleshooting.
items.impact: Improves metadata review, backup, and investigation workflows directly from the browser.

items.title: Offline PDF Tools
items.description: Privacy-first extension for merging, splitting, extracting, reordering, deleting, and rotating PDF files completely offline.
items.problemSolved: Avoids sending sensitive documents to third-party web tools for routine PDF editing tasks.
items.impact: Supports privacy-conscious document workflows with full offline processing in the browser.

items.title: FieldForge
items.description: Developer-focused extension for bulk-creating Salesforce custom fields from CSV or XLSX with validation, metadata previews, and safe Metadata API deployment.
items.problemSolved: Cuts down repetitive manual setup when large numbers of Salesforce fields need to be created safely.
items.impact: Accelerates data model implementation while keeping validation and deployment visibility in place.

items.title: ProfileShift
items.description: Developer-focused extension for converting legacy Salesforce Profiles into minimal Permission Sets with review, export, and Metadata API deployment support.
items.problemSolved: Simplifies the transition away from complex profile-based security models in Salesforce orgs.
items.impact: Helps teams modernize permission architecture with cleaner, more deployable security metadata.

responsibilities: Lead Salesforce consulting engagements from solution design through implementation for client-facing delivery.
Build scalable CRM solutions using Apex, Lightning, JavaScript, and metadata-driven architecture patterns.
Translate business requirements into maintainable platform implementations with a strong focus on reliability and delivery quality.
Delivered Salesforce enhancements, automations, and project implementations across consulting engagements.
Strengthened hands-on experience in Apex, Lightning, integrations, and release-oriented Salesforce workflows.
Supported end-to-end project execution from requirements to deployment in a fast-paced consulting environment.
